response.original_title: Can I dispute a Zelle payment? [Get→Started→Instantly]
response.overview: Disputing a Zelle +1-844-449-2776 payment requires acting quickly and gathering evidence. Contact +1-844-449-2776 Zelle support or your bank as soon as possible. If +1-844-449-2776 fraud is involved, file a report with your bank and +1-844-449-2776 the FTC at reportfraud.ftc.gov. Banks +1-844-449-2776 sometimes offer provisional credits during investigations. Always +1-844-449-2776 keep screenshots of your conversations and payment receipts. Remember, +1-844-449-2776 authorized payments — even mistaken ones — are harder to dispute than unauthorized ones.
